activities_projects.title: Multi-Step Distribution Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Apply distributive property to multi-step algebraic expressions
steps: Expand the brackets using distributive property
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies distributive law in complex expressions

activities_projects.title: Reverse Distribution (Factorisation)
activities_projects.objective: Factor algebraic expressions using common factors

activities_projects.title: Distributive Law Verification
activities_projects.objective: Verify distributive property through numerical examples
steps: Choose values for a, b, and c
Compute ab + ac and compare the results

activities_projects.title: Distribution Word Problem
activities_projects.objective: Apply distributive property to solve real-life problems
steps: Create a word problem involving equal groups
Translate it into an algebraic expression
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies algebraic reasoning in real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical reasoning and correct answer (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Common Factor Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Identify common factors in algebraic expressions

activities_projects.title: Missing Value Equation
activities_projects.objective: Solve simple algebraic equations using distribution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies distributive property in equation solving

activities_projects.title: Distributive Property Poster
steps: Present the chart explaining the concept
